completed_tasks.name: Add active_side_tab signal + on_side_tab_click handler + widen config_summary destructure + 9-prop AgentPanel call site
Visual UAT — verify tab strip + INFO cards render correctly via dx serve
completed_tasks.progress: UAT attempted: dx serve built successfully (2904ms), browser opened, but tab strip not visible. Investigation ruled out code, CSS, build, and layout issues. Root cause: suspected browser cache serving old WASM.

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run UAT after hard browser refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) or incognito window, confirm all 11 verification steps pass
If UAT passes: create 26.4-04-SUMMARY.md, run verify-phase, update ROADMAP/STATE, commit watermark files, advance to next phase

blockers.description: UAT Task 2 human-verify checkpoint: tab strip not visible in browser despite correct code + CSS + successful build. Suspected browser cache serving old WASM/CSS.
blockers.workaround: Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) or open http://127.0.0.1:8080 in an incognito window. If still failing, open DevTools > Elements and check whether div.wh-side-tabs is in the DOM.

human_actions_pending.action: Hard-refresh the browser (Cmd+Shift+R) or open in incognito, then re-run the 11 UAT verification steps in the 26.4-04-PLAN.md Task 2
human_actions_pending.context: All code/CSS/build checks passed in investigation. The tab strip should be visible once the browser loads the fresh WASM. If still missing after hard refresh, check DevTools Elements for div.wh-side-tabs to distinguish DOM-missing vs CSS-hiding.

decisions.decision: Browser cache is the suspected root cause for missing tab strip — not a code or CSS bug
decisions.rationale: All 4 plan-04 code edits verified in warp_hermes.rs; CSS classes present in warp-ih.css; cargo check exits 0; layout structure correct. No code path that could suppress rendering identified.

next_action: User hard-refreshes browser (Cmd+Shift+R) or opens incognito window at http://127.0.0.1:8080. If tab strip appears and all 11 UAT steps pass, type 'approved' to proceed to SUMMARY + verify-phase. If still missing, inspect DevTools Elements for div.wh-side-tabs.
context_notes: Phase 26.4 is the last plan of the phase (04 of 04). Plans 01-03 are fully done with SUMMARYs. Only the UAT gate for plan 04 remains. The uncommitted warp-ih.css and app.rs changes are a shield watermark feature (unrelated to 26.4 tab strip work) — they add position:relative to .wh-side, a ::before watermark overlay, and an _IH_SHIELD asset const. These should be committed or stashed before closing out 26.4. dx serve is running at http://127.0.0.1:8080.
